headline: Tigress Financial Maintains Buy on Airbnb, Lowers Price Target to $185
summary: Tigress Financial  analyst Ivan Feinseth   maintains Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $200 to $185.

raw.headline: Tigress Financial Maintains Buy on Airbnb, Lowers Price Target to $185

headline: Airbnb Stock Surges Wednesday: Here's What's Going On
summary: Airbnb Inc (NASDAQ:ABNB) shares are jumping higher on Wednesday as travel and leisure names rally across global markets. The tone shifted sharply after President Donald Trump said the U.S. and Iran had already aligned on several elements of a conflict‑resolution plan and would work "closely" together during a two‑week ceasefire.

headline: Shares of travel and leisure companies are trading higher after President Trump's social media post indicated that the U.S. will work closely with Iran, and the countries have already agreed to several key points in the proposed conflict-resolution plan. Yesterday's two-week ceasefire agreement and easing oil prices support a warm industry outlook.
